narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military procurement, undermining the integrity and effectiveness of its war effort.

narratives.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narratives.reasoning: This statement declares Western and European sanctions as largely ineffective, directly criticizing and discrediting a key diplomatic and economic policy of the West.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narratives.reasoning: This highlights a significant negative outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and their own policies, fitting the narrative of adverse impacts on the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the Ukrainian military as vastly outnumbered and merely 'holding on' against a superior force, implicitly undermining its capability and effectiveness despite the context of resistance.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly alleges large-scale corruption (धांधली) in Ukrainian military procurement, seeking to delegitimize the government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This claim explicitly states that Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, supporting the narrative of Ukraine being a client state or puppet of the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती. इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This paints a picture of a prolonged war with no prospect of ceasefire, coupled with the suggestion that even the US is standing by idly while Ukraine clings to false hope, portraying a dire and hopeless situation for Ukraine.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, portraying Western punitive measures as ineffective and weak.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote suggests that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying their unity was fragile and self-interest-driven, highlighting division and vulnerability within Europe.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote discredits Western diplomacy by portraying the West as arrogant and deluded in its assumption of global support, and highlights its failure to rally the world (specifically the Global South) against Russia. This supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which is a clear promotion of the idea that sanctions have backfired or been ineffective.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis) caused by the war and its geopolitical fallout, which supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the specific definitions for sanctions backfiring or refugee flows.
